title: Proclamation No. 519, s. 1940
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 519

RESERVING FOR SCHOOL PURPOSES THREE (3) PARCELS OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE POBLACION, MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF BARLIG, SUBPROVINCE OF BONTOC, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for school purposes, under the administration of the Director of Education, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcels of the public domain, situated in the Poblacion, municipal district of Barlig, subprovince of Bontoc, Mountain Province, island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plans Psu-107407 and Psu-107408, to wit:

A parcel of land, (Plan Psu-107407, G. L. R. O. Rec. No.), situated in the Poblacion, municipal district of Barlig, Mountain Province (subprovince of Bontoc), island of Luzon. Bounded on the NE. and SE. by public land; on the S. by the property of the Municipal District Government of Barlig (Lot No. 2, Psu-107408); and on the NW. by public land. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 43° 35′ W., 4,007.82 meters, more or less, from Triangulation Station, Mt. Amuyao, thence N. 56° 10′ W., 59.68 m. to point “2”; thence S. 73′ 03′ W., 36.85 m. to point “3”; thence N. 22° 32′ E., 43.89 m. to point “4”; thence S. 77° 31′ E., 89.66 m. to point “5”; thence S. 24° 07′ W., 47.82 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of three thousand one hundred fifty-six square meters ( 3,156) more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and on the ground; are marked by P. L. S. stone monuments, 15 x 15 x 60 cms; bearings true; declination, 0° 22, E.; date of survey January 3-5, March 26-27 and December 18, 1938, and that of the approval, April 15, 1939.

Lot No. 1 (school site). – A parcel of land (Lot No. 1 of G. L. R. O. Record No.), situated in the Poblacion, municipal district of Barlig, Mountain Province (subprovince of Bontoc), island of Luzon. Bounded on the N. by Lot No. 3; on the NE. by Lot No. 3 and properties of Pour Camicho and Adcamang and Manal-og (joint owners) and trial (10-12 m. wide); on the SE. by  the property of Adcamang and Manal-og (joint owner) ; on the SW., by the properties of Tacdaguen, Jorge Tong-lat, and Na-ayao et al.; and on the NW. by dry creek (20 m. wide) and Lot No. 3. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, N. 44′ 39′ W., 3,960.30 meters, more or less, from Triangulation Station, Mt. Amuyao, thence N. 40° 32′ W., 56.39 m. to point “2”; thence N. 77° 17′ W., 9.77 m. to point “3” thence N.  71′ 22′ W., 59.22 m  to point “4”; thence N.27° 17’ E., 44.98 m. to point “5”; thence S. 89° 24′ E., 5.75 m. to point “6”; thence S. 21° 40′ E., 15.71 m. to point “7”; thence  S. 56° 31′ E., 35.92 m. to point “8”; thence N. 83° 28’ E., 4.57 m- to point “9”; thence N. 46° 07′ E., 15.91 m. to point “10”; thence S. 87° 59′ E., 5.66 m. to point “11”; thence S. 35° 32′ E., 21.66 m. to point “12”; S.60° 31’ E., 29.64 m. point “13”; thence S. 53° 48′ W., 11.78 m. to point “14”; thence S. 61° 24′ E., 25.15 m. to point “15”; thence S. 47° 40′ W., 43.91 m. to the point of beginning;  containing an area of four thousand eight hundred. sixty-nine square meters (4,869)   more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and on the ground, are marked by P. L. S. stone monuments, 15 x 15 x 60 cms.; bearings; true; declination 0° 22′  E.; date of survey, January 3-5, March 26-27, and December 18, 1938, and that of the approval, April 14, 1936.

Lot No. 2 (school site). – A parcel of land (Lot No 2 of plan Psu-107408, G. L. R. O. Record No.    ), situated in the Poblacion, municipal district of Barlig, Mountain Province (subprovince of Bontoc), island of Luzon. Bounded on the NE. by the property of The Municipal District Government of Barlig (Psu-107407); on the S., by the property of Pour Camicho and Lot No. 3; on the S. and SW., by Lot No. 3; and on the NW, by the property of the Municipal District Government of Barlig (Psu-107407). Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 43° 35′ W., 4,007.82 meters, more or less, from Triangulation Station, Mt. Amuyao, thence S. 89° 19′ W., 29.08 m. to point “2”; thence N. 63° 45′ W., 13.61 m. to point “3”; thence S. 87° 48′ W., 10.17 m. to point “4”; thence S. 48° 02′ W., 12.80 m. to point “5”; thence N. 57° 42′ W., 21.19 m. to point “6”; thence N. 22° 22′ W.,15.62 m. to point “7”; thence N. 73° 03′ E., 36.85 m. to point “8”; thence S. 56° 10′ E., 59.68 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of one thousand five hundred seventy-nine square meters (1,579) more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground, are marked by P. L. S. stone monuments, 15 x 15 x 60 cms.; bearings true; declination 0° 22′ E.; date of survey, January 3-5, March 26-27, and December 18, 1938, and that of the approval, April 4, 1939.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this first day of March, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fifth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
